page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m2.large is an entry-level virtual server instance belonging to the ecs.u0 utility family. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz, paired with 4.0 GB of system memory. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and utilizes the x86_64 CPU architecture. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates entry-level performance characteristics. Both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests place the server in the lower performance tiers, with a single-core score of 1093.88 and a multi-core score of 1458.47. Memory bandwidth tests show read-only large block speeds of 9.92 GB/sec and write speeds of 9.22 GB/sec. Similarly, Geekbench and Passmark CPU scores fall into the bottom 10% of tested hardware, reflecting its positioning as a resource-constrained environment.

The instance is designed for qualitative cost efficiency in workloads that do not demand high-performance computing or massive memory capacity. It is best suited for lightweight, non-critical applications such as basic static web serving, minor Redis caching tasks, simple background scripting, or development and testing environments where resource utilization remains low.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m2.large is an entry-level, x86_64 virtual server configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 4.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz, this KVM-based instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. Benchmark results, including a Passmark CPU score of 1814.69 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 1093.0, place its performance in the lower tiers. This server is qualitatively cost-efficient for lightweight workloads, making it suitable for basic static web serving, low-traffic Redis caching, and development or testing environments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m2.large is an entry-level virtual server with 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for lightweight utility workloads and testing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m2.large features 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps bandwidth, suitable for entry-level utility workloads.
tagline: An entry-level, dual-core virtual server designed for lightweight utility workloads, basic web serving, and development environments.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz
4.0 GB of system memory with a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Entry-level CPU and memory benchmark performance
Best suited for static web serving, basic caching, and testing
